expectations.text: Every command in the workflow would actually succeed if run (no interactive-only commands in automated context, no server-admin commands, no missing required flags)
expectations.evidence: All commands use discrete CLI subcommands (workspaces create, profiles create, context set, etc). No use of clams init or clams setup. All required flags present.

expectations.text: Configures the Electrum onchain source before creating the XPub connection (required dependency)
expectations.evidence: Step 7 (onchain create) precedes Step 8 (connections create --kind XPub).

expectations.text: XPub connection configuration includes address_types, gap_limit, and network fields (not just the bare xpub key)
expectations.evidence: Config JSON includes address_types: ["bech32"], gap_limit: 20, wallet_first_tx_block_height: 1, network: "bitcoin".

expectations.text: Runs journals process after sync and before generating any report
expectations.evidence: Step 11 (journals process) comes after Step 10 (sync) and before Step 13 (balance-sheet).

expectations.text: The workflow ends with the user seeing their balance (balance sheet or portfolio summary)
expectations.evidence: Step 13: clams reports balance-sheet --format plain. Step 14: clams reports portfolio-summary --format plain.

expectations.text: Commands whose output feeds into subsequent steps use --machine --format json so the output can be reliably parsed
expectations.evidence: workspaces create, profiles create, context set, onchain create, connections create all use --machine --format json. Display commands correctly use --format plain.
